lines.en_lit: Nicanor, miracles were performed to his doors. The Sages taught What miracles occurred for his doors? They said: When Nicanor went to bring doors from Alexandria in Egypt, on his return a storm arose in the sea to drown him. took one and cast it into the sea, And still the sea did not rest from its rage.

They sought to cast the other stood and embraced it said to them: Cast me into with it. Immediately, the sea rested from its rage, and he regretted of the other When they arrived at the port of Akko was poking out under the sides of the ship. And some say a sea creature swallowed it and spewed it onto the land.

And with regard to this, Solomon said: “The beams of our houses are cedars, and our doors are cypresses [berotim]” Do not read berotim but berit yam, Therefore, all the gates in the Temple were altered to become gold except the Gates of Nicanor because miracles were performed to them. And some say because their copper was brightly-colored Rabbi Eliezer ben Ya’akov says it was refined [kelonita] copper, and it illuminated like gold.
MISHNA: those unfavorably. of the House of Garmu did not want to teach of the preparation of the shewbread of the House of Avtinas did not want to teach of the preparation of the incense.

Hugras ben Levi knew a chapter music, and he did not want to teach ben Kamtzar did not want to teach act of writing. About the first it is stated: “The memory of the righteous shall be for a blessing” and about these it is stated: “But the name of the wicked shall rot”

GEMARA: The Sages taught House of Garmu were expert in preparation the shewbread, and they did not want to teach The Sages sent for and brought craftsmen from Alexandria in Egypt, And knew to bake like but they did not know to remove like they that these light outside and bake it outside and these light inside and bake inside. these their bread becomes moldy and these their bread does not become moldy.

When the Sages heard of the matter they said: Whatever the Holy One, Blessed be He, created, He created in His honor, as it is stated: “Everyone who is called by My name, I have created for My glory” and the House of Garmu return to their station. The Sages sent for them and they did not come. They doubled their wages and they came. Each day they would take twelve maneh, and today twenty-four maneh. Rabbi Yehuda says: Each day twenty-four and today forty-eight.

The Sages said to them: What did you see that you not to teach They said: father’s house knew that this house, is destined to be destroyed, lest an unworthy man learn and go and engage in idol worship with And for this matter they are mentioned favorably: Never was refined bread found in the hands of their descendants, so that would not say they are sustained from that preparing the shewbread. to fulfill that which is stated: “And you shall be clear before the Lord and before Israel”

of the House of Avtinas did not want to teach about the preparation of the incense, The Sages taught The House of Avtinas were expert in the preparing the incense, and they did not want to teach The Sages sent for and brought craftsmen from Alexandria in Egypt. And knew to blend like they but they did not know to cause the smoke to rise like did. of these rises in a column like a stick; of these branched out to here and to there

When the Sages heard of the matter, they said: Whatever the Holy One, Blessed be He, created, He created in His honor, as it is stated: “God made everything for His sake” and the House of Avtinas return to their station. The Sages sent for and they did not come. They doubled their wages and they came. Each day they would take twelve maneh, and today twenty-four maneh. Rabbi Yehuda says: Each day twenty-four and today forty-eight.

The Sages said to them: What did you see that not to teach They said: father’s house knew that this house, is destined to be destroyed, lest an unworthy man learn and go and engage in idol worship with And for this matter they are mentioned favorably: Never did a perfumed bride emerge from their homes. And when they marry a woman from a different place, they stipulate with her that she will not perfume herself, so that would not say it is with the work of the incense they perfume themselves, to fulfill that which is stated: “And you shall be clear before the Lord and before Israel”

It was taught Rabbi Yishmael said: One time I was walking along the road and I found one of descendants I said to him: Your fathers sought to enhance their honor and sought to diminish God’s honor Now, the honor of God remains as it was, He diminished their honor,

Rabbi Akiva said: One time Rabbi Yishmael ben Loga related to me: One time I and one of the descendants went out to the field to collect herbs, and I saw that he laughed and he cried. I said to him: Why did you cry? He said to me: I was reminded of the honor of my forefathers, And why did you laugh? He said to me: The Holy One, Blessed be He, is going to restore it to us in the future And why are you reminded He said to me: The smoke-raising is before me, Show it to me; He said to me: We are bound by oath not to show it to any person

Rabbi Yoḥanan ben Nuri said: One time I found an old man who had in his hand a scroll of spices. I said to him: Where are you from? He said to me: I am from the House of Avtinas. And what is in your hand? He said to me: A scroll of spices. Show it to me. He said to me: As long as the House my forefathers, was extant, they would not pass it on to anyone. And now, here it is; and be careful with it And when I came and related my statement before Rabbi Akiva, he said to me: And now it is prohibited to mention them unfavorably,
From here, ben Azzai said: by your name they shall call you and in your place, they shall seat you,
